descriptionShort: BCJHL season preview covers Interior and Coastal divisions, noting Richmond Sockeyes' expectations for 1987-88 season.
descriptionLong: This Times Colonist preview article surveys the 1987-88 British Columbia Junior Hockey League season across Interior and Coastal divisions. The Richmond Sockeyes, who finished first last season with a 38-14 record, are expected to take a back seat to Interior rivals Kelowna and Penticton. Coach Ernie Gare expresses confidence in the team's defensive prospects. Vernon Lakers are touted as Interior favorites; Delta Flyers favored in Coastal Division.
